title: ESAM Workflow Definition
description: Schema for ESAM (Evolving Software Agent Management) workflow definitions, the YAML-as-source-of-truth format for agent workflow orchestration.

description.description: Detailed description of what the workflow does
examples: Draft, review, schedule, and publish social media content across platforms

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this workflow was created

updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this workflow was last updated

input_schema.description: Optional JSON Schema (Draft 2020-12) describing expected workflow input variables

authority.description: Default Delegation of Authority applied to all steps unless overridden at the step level

tool_instances.description: Map of named tool instances available to tool_call steps in this workflow

credentials.description: Credential references used by tool_instances and steps in this workflow (actual secrets stored in vault)

steps.description: Ordered list of step definitions in this workflow

connections.description: Directed edges between steps defining execution flow

DelegationOfAuthority.title: Delegation of Authority
DelegationOfAuthority.description: Controls what an agent step (or the whole workflow) is permitted to do: cost limits, model restrictions, tool access, and escalation policies

level.description: Authority level granted to the agent for this scope

cost_limit_cents.description: Maximum cost in USD cents this scope is allowed to incur before the gate trips

hard_gate.description: If true, execution is blocked when limits are exceeded; if false, a warning is logged but execution continues

model_allowlist.description: Explicit list of model identifiers the scope is allowed to use; empty array means no restriction

output_schema.description: Optional JSON Schema (as a string) constraining the output structure for steps in this scope

escalation_contact.description: Contact identifier (email, Slack handle, phone) for human escalation when authority level is exceeded

tool_allowlist.description: Optional list of tool instance names this scope is restricted to; absent means all configured tool instances are allowed

credential_scope.description: Logical credential scope label for tenant isolation (e.g. "customer-123", "campaign-Q2")

ToolInstance.title: Tool Instance
ToolInstance.description: A configured instance of a registered tool, bound to credentials and environment settings

tool_ref.description: Reference to a tool in the tool registry

tier.description: Lifetime and scope of this tool instance

credential_ref.description: Reference to a credential entry in the workflow's credentials array

config.description: Arbitrary configuration key-value pairs passed to the tool at runtime

CredentialReference.title: Credential Reference
CredentialReference.description: A reference to a secret stored in the vault; never contains the actual secret value

id.description: Logical identifier used to reference this credential from tool_instances or steps

ref.description: Logical reference path to the actual secret in the vault

Connection.title: Connection
Connection.description: A directed edge between two steps in the workflow graph

label.description: Optional display label for this connection edge

condition.description: Optional expression evaluated at runtime to determine whether this edge is taken

RetryPolicy.title: Retry Policy
RetryPolicy.description: Configuration for automatic retries when a step fails

backoff_seconds.description: Initial backoff duration in seconds before the first retry (exponential backoff applied)

on_status_codes.description: HTTP status codes or error codes that trigger a retry; empty array means retry on any failure

Escalation.title: Escalation
Escalation.description: Configuration for human escalation steps, specifying how and to whom the escalation is sent

subject.description: Subject line for the escalation notification, may contain template variables

body_template.description: Template for the escalation body content

timeout_hours.description: Maximum time in hours before the escalation auto-expires

timeout_minutes.description: Maximum time in minutes before the escalation auto-expires (alternative to timeout_hours)

response_options.description: Available response actions for the human reviewer

EscalationResponseOption.title: Escalation Response Option
EscalationResponseOption.description: A single possible response action a human reviewer can take

label.description: Human-readable button/link label for this action

next_step.description: Step ID to route to when this action is chosen

require_text.description: If true, the reviewer must provide accompanying text (explanation, edits) with this response

LoopConfig.title: Loop Config
LoopConfig.description: Configuration for a loop step that iterates over a collection and executes child steps

iterator.description: Variable name assigned to each element during iteration

source.description: Expression resolving to the collection to iterate over

max_iterations.description: Maximum number of iterations before the loop terminates (safety limit)

Branches.title: Branches
Branches.description: Branch targets for a conditional step

true.description: Step ID to execute when the condition evaluates to true

false.description: Step ID to execute when the condition evaluates to false

StepBaseFields.title: Step Base Fields
StepBaseFields.description: Common properties shared by every step type

id.description: Unique step identifier within the workflow. Alphanumeric characters and hyphens only.

label.description: Human-readable label displayed in workflow visualisations

position.description: X,Y canvas position for visual workflow editors

description.description: Longer description of what this step does
examples: Draft a social media post based on the topic and platform

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum execution time for this step in seconds before it is aborted

retry_policy.description: Retry configuration for this step on failure

authority.description: Step-level Delegation of Authority (overrides workflow-level authority)

StepTypeFields.title: Step Type Fields
StepTypeFields.description: Properties specific to each step type, discriminated by the type field value

prompt.description: LLM prompt supporting template variable syntax with {{}} and Jinja-like filters
examples: Draft a social media post for {{input.platform}} about: {{input.topic}}

model.description: Model identifier to use for this call

temperature.description: LLM sampling temperature (0.0 = deterministic, 2.0 = very creative)

max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens in the LLM response

prompt.description: Instruction prompt explaining what the tool should do and how to process its output

model.description: Model identifier used for orchestration/planning when invoking the tool

tools.description: List of tool instance names (from tool_instances or tool registry) to invoke

prompt.description: Context prompt shown to the human reviewer summarising what needs review
examples: Review the following social media post: Platform: {{input.platform}} Draft: {{steps.step-draft.post_text}}

model.description: Model identifier (used for generating escalation summaries or context)

escalation.description: Escalation configuration including subject, body template, and response options

workflow_ref.description: Reference to another workflow definition by name or path

input_mapping.description: Map of input variable names to expressions resolving values from the current workflow context

condition.description: Boolean expression evaluated at runtime to determine branch routing

branches.description: Branch targets for true and false outcomes of the condition

loop_config.description: Loop configuration defining the iterator, source collection, and iteration limits

child_steps.description: Steps to execute inside each loop iteration

Step.title: Step
Step.description: A single step in the workflow — one of: llm_call, tool_call, human_escalation, sub_workflow, conditional, or loop
